title: valerianella coronata f. pumila
intro: Valerianella coronata f. pumila, also known as dwarf corn salad or small valerianella, is a small, annual herb belonging to the family Valerianaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Valerianella coronata f. pumila are said to include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or dried and used in capsules, and it is also sometimes used in salads for its peppery flavor.
